g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Phase 1: Setup and data understanding in detail')
g.text: Install Python tools · Load dataset · Explore columns

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Phase 2: Data cleaning in detail')
g.text: Handle missing values · Fix dates · Remove duplicates

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Phase 3: RFM analysis in detail')
g.text: Calculate Recency · Frequency · Monetary value per customer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Phase 4: K-Means clustering in detail')
g.text: Normalize data · Find best K · Assign customer segments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Phase 5: Label and interpret segments')
g.text: Name groups: Loyal · High spender · At-risk · Lost
Charts in Python · Export to Power BI / Tableau

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Python skills will I learn in this project?')
sendPrompt('What machine learning concepts will I learn?')
sendPrompt('What business analytics skills will I learn?')

svg.text: Total: ~12–17 hours · Click any phase above to start ↑
